title: Hornet Removal in Prospect Heights, Brooklyn | $350–$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Prospect Heights, Brooklyn. Safe, effective elimination of hornet nests. Licensed experts. Call today for $350–$550 service.
intro: Hornets building nests around your Prospect Heights brownstone or apartment building can pose serious risks to residents and visitors. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, professional hornet removal services throughout Prospect Heights, protecting families and properties from aggressive stinging insects. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests and prevent future infestations in this historic Brooklyn neighborhood.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Prospect Heights homeowners and property managers for years with safe, effective hornet removal solutions. Our licensed technicians understand the unique architecture of Prospect Heights' historic buildings and use targeted methods to remove hornets without damaging your property's character or charm.
localContext: Prospect Heights' tree-lined streets, proximity to Prospect Park, and mix of vintage brownstones and modern developments create ideal nesting conditions for hornets, especially during warmer months. The neighborhood's abundance of gardens, outdoor dining spaces along Vanderbilt Avenue, and proximity to green spaces means hornet activity can disrupt daily life and outdoor enjoyment for residents.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Prospect Heights?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal service in Prospect Heights. Most hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on nest size and location. We understand the urgency of hornet problems and prioritize rapid response for Brooklyn residents.

faqs.question: What does the $350–$550 hornet removal service include?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes complete inspection, safe nest removal or treatment, elimination of all hornets, preventative measures to discourage return, and a follow-up visit if needed. Pricing depends on nest size, location accessibility, and height requirements for removal.

faqs.question: Are hornet removal treatments safe for my Prospect Heights brownstone?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted treatment methods specifically designed to protect historic properties and architectural features common in Prospect Heights. Our technicians are trained to safely remove hornets from eaves, cornices, and other delicate areas without causing damage to your building's exterior.

faqs.question: When is hornet season in Prospect Heights?
faqs.answer: Hornet activity peaks in Prospect Heights from late spring through early fall, typically May through October. Nests grow largest in late summer (August-September), when hornets are most aggressive. Early detection and removal in spring or early summer can prevent larger infestations and reduce costs.
